issues.description: Flaky prefetch timing test in resource-constrained environments

sharedStateObservations.content: Layer-wise Loading Test Tolerance: test_prefetch_reduces_load_time may need relaxed timing thresholds in CI/resource-constrained environments. Consider using 3x threshold instead of 2x for reliable test runs.

notes: Solid AirLLM-style layer-wise loading implementation. Model sharding, on-demand loading, LRU cache, prefetcher all working correctly. Memory efficiency tests pass. Thread-safe layer cache implementation. Comprehensive test coverage for all major functionality. One flaky timing test exists but is not a functional issue.
